home.heroDescription: Your all-in-one learning companion for first-year science. Everything you need to study, practice, and track your academic progress — all in one place.
home.step1: Pick a <course>course</course> below → open a <chapter>chapter</chapter> → watch the <video>video lecture</video>
home.step2: After watching, take the chapter <quiz>quiz</quiz> to test yourself
home.step3: Your <firstAttempt>first attempt</firstAttempt> earns XP — retakes update your high score but give <zeroXP>0 XP</zeroXP>
home.step4: Track everything from <progress>Progress</progress> and compete on the <leaderboard>Leaderboard</leaderboard>
home.xpWarning: ⚠️ XP is awarded on your <firstAttempt>first attempt only</firstAttempt>. Retakes update your best score but won't give more XP.
home.videoLecturesDesc: Watch organized lecture videos for each chapter
home.progressDashboardDesc: Charts, quiz trends, and course-by-course analytics
home.rankingLeaderboardDesc: Compete with classmates, climb from E-Rank to SSS
home.quizzesGpaDesc: First attempt = XP. Retakes update your best score only
home.term2Active: Term 2 courses are active — start learning!

onboarding.competDescription: See how you stack up against your classmates! The leaderboard shows:
onboarding.competSection: Compete with students from <section>your section</section> and across the <faculty>entire faculty</faculty>!
onboarding.courseMaterialsDesc: Access all semester courses with videos, PDFs, and notes
onboarding.interactiveQuizzesDesc: Test your knowledge with quizzes for every course
onboarding.gpaCalculatorDesc: Track and predict your academic performance
onboarding.securePrivateDesc: Your data is encrypted and only you can access it
onboarding.readyDescription: Your academic adventure begins now. Complete lessons, ace quizzes, and climb the ranks to become the top student!
onboarding.proTipText: Start with the first lesson of any course. You need to complete lessons in order to unlock the next ones!

tour.welcomeDesc:
You've been chosen to shape how your section learns.

This 2-minute walkthrough will show you exactly how to upload content, manage lessons, and coordinate with your team.

4 pages · takes ~2 min · only shows once
tour.guildCardDesc:
Your team headquarters. Create quests, assign tasks to other leaders, and chat in real-time.

Think of it as your private war room.
tour.uploadCardDesc:
This is where the magic happens — upload videos, PDFs, and quizzes for your students.

One click and hundreds of students can access it.
tour.manageCardDesc: Edit titles, swap videos, update PDFs, or remove outdated content. Full control over everything you've uploaded.
tour.notifySectionDesc:
Send announcements directly to your students' phones. New lecture? Exam reminder? They'll get an instant push notification.

Delivery is immediate — no delays.
tour.dashboardDoneDesc:
You've got the lay of the land. Next up: the Upload page — with drag-and-drop uploads, progress tracking, and a step-by-step builder.

💡 You can always replay this tour later from the dashboard.
tour.uploadWelcomeDesc:
Welcome to the new Lesson Builder! Notice the step indicator at the top — it tracks your progress as you fill in Course → Details → Media → Submit.

Let's walk through each section.
tour.uploadStep1Desc:
Every lesson belongs to a course. Courses are split by semester — Semester 2 is active, Semester 1 is archived.

⚠️ Double-check this — students only see content in their enrolled course.
tour.uploadTitleStepDesc:
This is what students see in the course page. Be clear and specific:

✓ Lecture 5: Chemical Bonding
✓ Section 3 — Organic Reactions
✗ lecture 5
✗ new lesson
tour.uploadVideoStepDesc:
Paste YouTube links here. You can add multiple videos — just click 'Add another video'.

When there are 2+ videos, students see a playlist sidebar to switch between parts — like a mini Netflix for your lecture.

💡 Tip: Give each part a title like 'Part 1 — Theory' so students know what's what.
tour.uploadPdfStepDesc:
The new upload zone supports drag & drop! Just drag a PDF onto the upload area.

1. Drag & drop or click to browse (up to 500MB)
2. Paste a link — from Google Drive, Dropbox, etc.

Each file shows a progress bar during upload. Invalid files get instant feedback.

Students get download buttons right next to the video.
tour.uploadQuizStepDesc:
Paste raw quiz text and our AI parser will automatically detect questions, options, and correct answers.

Students must pass the quiz to unlock the next lesson — it's how the progression system works.

Supports MCQ, True/False, and fill-in-the-blank.
tour.uploadStep3Desc:
Hit this button and your lesson goes live instantly. Students in the course will see it in their lesson list right away.

Don't worry — you can always edit or remove it later from the Manage page.
tour.uploadDoneDesc: You now know how to build a full lesson from scratch. Next: the Manage page — where you edit and organize everything.
tour.lessonsWelcomeDesc:
Everything you and other leaders have uploaded lives here — organized by course.

This is your control center for editing, reordering, and removing content.
tour.lessonsOverviewDesc:
Lessons are grouped by course. Expand any course to see all its lessons, ordered by upload date.

Scroll down to find your course or use the list to jump to it.
tour.lessonsActionsDesc:
Each lesson has two actions:

✏️ Edit — Update title, swap video links, change PDF, or replace the quiz
🗑️ Delete — Permanently removes the lesson, its quiz, and all student progress

⚠️ Deletion is irreversible — be careful!
tour.lessonsDoneDesc: You can manage everything like a pro now. Final stop: the Guild Hall — where you coordinate with your team.
tour.guildWelcomeDesc:
This is where leaders work together. Create tasks, assign responsibilities, and communicate — all in one place.

Only leaders and admins can see this area.
tour.guildQuestBoardDesc:
Create quests (tasks) for your team:

• Upload Lecture 7 for Chemistry
• Create quiz for Organic Section 4
• Review student feedback

Assign them to specific leaders and track completion in real-time.
tour.guildChatDesc:
Real-time messaging with your fellow leaders. No delays, no emails — just instant communication.

Perfect for quick coordination during exam season.
tour.guildNicknameDesc:
Pick a custom display name for the Guild. It's your identity in the team — make it memorable.

Only visible to other leaders in the Guild Hall.
tour.completeDesc:
You've completed the full tour — every tool is at your fingertips.

Upload lessons. Manage content. Coordinate with your team. Your section is counting on you.

Go make an impact.
tour.tourSaveError: Failed to save tour progress. Please try again.
tour.tourSkipped: Tutorial skipped. You can ask an admin to reset your account if you want to see it again.

install.title: Install the App
install.descriptionAndroid: Add Science Hub to your home screen for quick access and a better experience.
install.descriptionIOS: Install Science Hub on your device for a better experience.
install.dismissed: You can install later from your browser menu.
